title: UI Update: Glassmorphism and Mobile Fixes
content: Just pushed a massive update to the repository. The header now features a sticky glass-morphism effect, and the mobile view for the gallery has been completely overhauled to prevent clipping and scrolling issues. Check out the Gallery tab to see the updated Compare toggle!

title: Exploring Dark Cyberpunk Aesthetics
content: I've uploaded a new batch of progression images to the gallery focusing on brutalist megastructures and neon-lit environments. The compare tool is especially useful here to see how lighting variations change the whole mood of the scene.

title: Future Plans: Integrating Video Prompts
content: Looking ahead, I'm researching ways to implement short WebM loop comparisons. While static image generation has reached an incredible level of fidelity, animating these latent spaces opens up a completely new dimension of visual storytelling.

title: Welcome to DualVisor
content: This is the launch of my new AI art gallery and blog. The site is fully static and runs on GitHub Pages, utilizing JSON files to act as a lightweight database for both the gallery folders and these blog posts.
